message:
test(info): add unit tests for --info command

Add unit tests for the new gatherInfo() function and InfoResult type,
ensuring system diagnostics are correctly collected.

Tests cover:
- InfoResult structure validation
- Version string format
- Configuration path detection
- Environment variable handling
- Dependency detection (cass, node, bun)

5 tests, all passing.
